body.purpose: Default 14px reading text on dense dark screens (Inter 400).

mono.purpose: Counts, times, macros, numeric data (IBM Plex Mono).

shadows.name: hairline
shadows.purpose: Resting cards and buttons — barely there.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single emerald call-to-action — used rarely so the signal stays meaningful.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 40px; background: var(--acc, #4bae88); color: var(--on-acc, #06130d); border: 1px solid rgb(var(--acc-rgb, 75 174 136) / .55); border-radius: 12px; padding: 0 18px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 650; letter-spacing: -.01em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(2,8,6,.55); transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--acc-solid, #3f9d78); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(var(--acc-rgb, 75 174 136) / .16); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(var(--acc-rgb, 75 174 136) / .34); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The default action button — quiet border on graphite, keeping the emerald primary rare.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 40px; background: var(--surface, #161e1a); color: var(--ink, #e7ede9); border: 1px solid var(--border, #26312b); border-radius: 12px; padding: 0 18px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), background 180ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--surface-2, #1d2621); border-color: var(--border-strong, rgba(75,174,136,.34)); }

components.name: Card
components.description: The primary container — graphite panel, generous radius, depth by tone not shadow.
components.html:
Dzisiaj

3 zadania, 1 wydarzenie, 2 nawyki do uzupełnienia.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--surface, #161e1a); color: var(--ink, #e7ede9); border: 1px solid var(--border, #26312b); border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(2,8,6,.55); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Sora', 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; letter-spacing: -.01em; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--ink-2, #a6b3ac); margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Quiet field with an emerald focus ring — never a harsh glow.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: var(--surface, #161e1a); color: var(--ink, #e7ede9); border: 1px solid var(--border, #26312b); border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--ink-3, #7a877f); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: rgb(var(--acc-rgb, 75 174 136) / .42); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(var(--acc-rgb, 75 174 136) / .14); }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Module nav entry — muted at rest, emerald when active, no heavy underline.
components.html: StartPracaSport
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; gap: 4px; background: var(--surface, #161e1a); border: 1px solid var(--border, #26312b); border-radius: 12px; padding: 4px; } .ds-nav-item { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink-2, #a6b3ac); text-decoration: none; padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: 8px; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), background 180ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: var(--ink, #e7ede9); background: var(--surface-2, #1d2621); } .ds-nav-item.is-active { color: var(--acc-ink, #86d9b7); background: rgb(var(--acc-rgb, 75 174 136) / .14); }

narrative.overview: Rootine OS is a dark-first personal life operating system. The primary identity is a premium graphite cockpit: a deep warm-graphite base with a green-blue undertone, carrying a single muted emerald signal. It reads like well-made control software — calm, dense where it counts, composed under load — not a movie HUD and not a cold admin panel. 'White Lotus' contributes humanity (warm graphite, desaturated emerald); 'Jarvis' contributes clarity and precision through information design, never neon. Dark is the product; a white-lotus light theme is the one supported alternative. Every surface is token-driven so the whole app stays coherent.
keyCharacteristics: Graphite base with a green-blue undertone; depth by tonal layering, not heavy shadow.
One restrained muted-emerald signal (<=10% of any screen) plus a muted natural status/event palette.
Sora display + Inter body; compact 14px base tuned for glanceable, dense screens.
Subtle borders, soft atmospheric surfaces, calm contrast.
Fully token-driven so the whole app (and the light alt) stays coherent from one source.

rules.name: The One Emerald Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one brand signal — Muted Emerald. It carries interaction, identity, and positive state; it does not decorate. If emerald is doing more than ~10% of a screen, something is over-accented.

rules.name: The No-Pure, No-Neon Rule
rules.body: No #000, no #fff, no neon green, no glow. Text is warm off-white; the darkest surface is warm graphite; emerald is desaturated. Purity reads cold and neon reads cyberpunk — both are anti-references.

rules.name: The Compact-Base Rule
rules.body: Body is 14px, not 16px. This is a cockpit, not an article. Hierarchy comes from weight and the Sora/Inter split, not from inflating sizes.

rules.name: The Tone-First Rule
rules.body: Reach for a surface-tone step before a shadow. On a dark base a tight drop shadow muddies; let tone do the lifting. Shadows are for things that truly float.

dos: Do author every surface against semantic tokens and rgb(var(--acc-rgb) / a) for accent tints, so it themes across dark/light for free.
Do convey depth by stepping surface tone first; add shadow only for elements that genuinely float.
Do keep the emerald signal rare and earned — interaction, identity, and positive state only; keep most of the UI graphite and navy.
Do keep body text at 14px and build hierarchy from weight and the Sora/Inter split.
Do lead each surface with 'what matters now?' (orient before act); prioritize signal over inventory.
donts: Don't use neon green, glow, hologram/HUD lines, or fake sci-fi panels. Advanced is not cyberpunk.
Don't use #000 or #fff or cold corporate gray. The base is warm graphite; text is warm off-white.
Don't add gamified flourishes — no streak confetti, mascots, badges, or celebratory bounce/elastic motion.
Don't fall into the generic SaaS-dashboard look: no gradient hero cards, no default purple, no icon-heading-text card grids, no meaningless insight widgets.
Don't create Notion/ClickUp clutter — no everything-at-once density, no nested config on primary surfaces.
Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe; carry tone with a leading icon, a soft tint, or a full hairline.
Don't use gradient text or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't hardcode hex values in new components; that breaks theming and drifts the system.
